notes: Nepali Date (BS) now works accurately across all countries and time zones.
Fixed issues where Nepali dates could appear incorrectly for users outside Nepal.
Improved Panchang date transitions based on each user's local time.
Enhanced sunrise-based Tithi, Nakshatra, and festival calculations.
Better timezone detection and date synchronization for global users.
More reliable calendar data for users in the USA, UK, Australia, Europe, Middle East, India, and other regions worldwide.
Improved BS ↔ AD date conversion accuracy.
Enhanced overall calendar stability and performance.
Fixed minor bugs and made general reliability improvements.
